use_cases: Mobile-first tab navigation with animated notch indicator that smoothly transitions between items
iOS-style tab bar navigation for mobile applications
Responsive navigation component that recalculates notch position on window resize
Accessible navigation with keyboard focus management and ARIA labels
Controlled or uncontrolled tab selection with callback support
ai_summary: A mobile-first navigation component featuring an animated 'notch' indicator that smoothly transitions between tab items. Implements responsive positioning calculations using getBoundingClientRect, supports both controlled and uncontrolled modes, includes keyboard navigation with focus management, and handles accessibility with customizable ARIA labels. The notch effect creates a pill-shaped highlight that moves to the active tab on selection or resize events.
